title: Homepage loads primary sections and content blocks
description: Verifies the homepage renders its primary content sections for first-time visitors.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the hero section is displayed
Verify a category grid and featured product cards are displayed

title: Homepage category navigation leads into browsing
description: Verifies a user can start browsing by entering a category from the homepage.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a category card in the category grid
Verify a product listing page for the selected category is displayed
Verify product cards are displayed

title: Homepage featured product card navigates to product details
description: Verifies clicking a featured product opens a product detail view.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a featured product card
Verify a product details page is displayed
Verify product information is displayed

title: Homepage trust signals section is visible
description: Verifies trust/benefits content is present on the homepage to support purchase confidence.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the trust signals section
Verify trust signals content is displayed

title: Homepage handles no featured products by showing an empty state
description: Verifies that when featured products are unavailable, the homepage shows an appropriate empty state rather than breaking layout.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for featured products to finish loading
Verify an empty state message is visible for featured products

title: Catalog page loads and displays category grid
description: Verifies the catalog page renders the category overview grid so users can choose where to browse.

steps.description: Navigate to /catalog
Verify a categories grid is displayed
Verify categories show icons and product counts

title: Catalog category card navigates to category products listing
description: Verifies that selecting a category from the catalog takes the user to its product listing page.

steps.description: Navigate to /catalog
Click a category card
Verify a product listing page for the selected category is displayed
Verify product cards are displayed

title: Catalog shows fallback when categories cannot be loaded
description: Verifies the catalog page displays a fallback message when categories fail to load.

steps.description: Navigate to /catalog
Wait for the categories request to finish loading
Verify a fallback message indicating categories cannot be loaded is visible

title: Category products page displays product grid and filter sidebar
description: Verifies a category listing page shows products and available filters (brand, price, availability).

steps.description: Navigate to /catalog
Click a category card
Verify a filter sidebar is displayed
Verify a product grid is displayed

title: Category products filters can be applied to refine results
description: Verifies applying a filter updates the product list based on selected criteria.

steps.description: Navigate to /catalog
Click a category card
Select a brand filter option
Wait for the product list to update
Verify the product list reflects the applied filter

title: Submit checkout successfully with valid customer, delivery, and payment details
description: Verifies a user can complete checkout and see an order confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /checkout
Fill valid customer name into the name field
Fill a valid phone number into the phone field
Fill a valid email into the email field
Select a delivery method
Select a payment method
Submit the checkout order
Verify an order confirmation is displayed

title: Checkout validation: missing customer phone prevents order submission
description: Verifies the checkout form enforces phone as required and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /checkout
Fill valid customer name into the name field
Clear the phone field
Fill a valid email into the email field
Select a delivery method
Select a payment method
Submit the checkout order
Verify a phone validation error is visible

title: Checkout page loads primary content
description: Verifies the checkout page renders the customer form and method selection sections.

steps.description: Navigate to /checkout
Verify customer information fields are displayed
Verify delivery and payment method options are displayed

title: Change delivery method selection updates the selected option
description: Verifies the user can switch between delivery methods and the UI reflects the selection.

steps.description: Navigate to /checkout
Select a delivery method
Select a different delivery method
Verify the newly selected delivery method is indicated as selected

title: Change payment method selection updates the selected option
description: Verifies the user can switch between payment methods and the UI reflects the selection.

steps.description: Navigate to /checkout
Select a payment method
Select a different payment method
Verify the newly selected payment method is indicated as selected

title: Attempting checkout with missing required customer fields shows validation errors
description: Verifies checkout blocks submission when required customer info is incomplete.

steps.description: Navigate to /checkout
Clear the name field
Clear the phone field
Select a delivery method
Select a payment method
Submit the checkout order
Verify required field validation errors are visible

title: Login successfully with valid phone and password
description: Verifies a user can log in and is taken into an authenticated state.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the phone field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the user is logged in

title: Login fails with invalid password and shows an error
description: Verifies invalid credentials do not authenticate the user and an error is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the phone field with +996700000000
Fill in the password field with wrong
Submit the login form
Verify a login error is visible

title: Login page loads primary content
description: Verifies the login form fields are displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Verify phone and password fields are displayed
Verify a login submission control is displayed

title: Register successfully with valid details
description: Verifies a user can register a new account and becomes authenticated.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill Ivan into the name field
Fill a unique valid phone number into the phone field
Fill ivan@example.kg into the email field
Fill pwd1234 into the password field
Submit the registration form
Verify the user is registered and logged in

title: Register page loads primary content
description: Verifies the registration form fields are displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Verify name, phone, email, and password fields are displayed
Verify a registration submission control is displayed

title: Registration validation: missing required fields prevents submission
description: Verifies registration blocks submission and shows validation errors when required fields are missing.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Clear the name field
Clear the phone field
Clear the email field
Clear the password field
Submit the registration form
Verify required field validation errors are visible

title: Favorites page loads saved products content
description: Verifies the Favorites page loads and shows either a saved products grid or an empty state.

steps.description: Navigate to /favorites
Verify the favorites page primary content is displayed as either a saved products grid or an empty state

title: Favorites empty state is shown when no saved items exist
description: Verifies the Favorites page can show an empty state without errors when there are no favorites.

steps.description: Navigate to /favorites
If any favorites are present, remove favorites until none remain
Verify an empty state message is visible

title: Remove an item from Favorites from the favorites list
description: Verifies a user can remove a saved item from the Favorites page and the list updates.

steps.description: Navigate to /favorites
If the list is empty, add a product to favorites from any product card available in the app
Remove one product from favorites from the favorites list
Verify the removed product no longer appears in the favorites list

title: Favorites persist after a page reload
description: Verifies that saved favorites persist after reloading the page.

steps.description: Navigate to /favorites
If the list is empty, add a product to favorites from any product card available in the app
Reload the page
Verify the favorites list still displays at least one saved product

title: Favorites allows navigating to a product detail from a saved item
description: Verifies the user can open a product details view from a saved favorite item.

steps.description: Navigate to /favorites
If the list is empty, add a product to favorites from any product card available in the app
Open the details page for a saved product from the favorites list
Verify product details are displayed

title: Favorites add action is disabled or prompts sign-in when unauthenticated
description: Verifies the UI prevents adding favorites or prompts authentication when not signed in.

steps.description: Navigate to /favorites
Attempt to add a product to favorites from any product card available in the app
Verify the UI indicates authentication is required or the action is prevented

title: Select Car page loads the step-by-step selector
description: Verifies the Select Car page loads and displays the first step for choosing a brand.

steps.description: Navigate to /select-car
Verify the vehicle selector is displayed with a brand selection step

title: Select Car complete flow: choose brand, model, and year
description: Verifies a user can complete the vehicle selection steps end-to-end.

steps.description: Navigate to /select-car
Select a car brand from the brand list
Select a model from the model list
Select a year from the year list
Verify the selected brand, model, and year are shown as the active vehicle selection

title: Select Car changing brand resets model and year selections
description: Verifies that changing the selected brand clears downstream selections.

steps.description: Navigate to /select-car
Select a car brand from the brand list
Select a model from the model list
Select a year from the year list
Change the selected car brand to a different brand
Verify the model and year selections are cleared or require re-selection

title: Select Car cannot proceed to model selection without choosing a brand
description: Verifies the UI prevents progressing to the next step without completing the current step.

steps.description: Navigate to /select-car
Attempt to proceed to the model selection step without selecting a brand
Verify the UI prevents moving forward and indicates a brand selection is required

title: Select Car preserves selections after page reload
description: Verifies the selected vehicle remains selected after reloading the page.

steps.description: Navigate to /select-car
Select a car brand from the brand list
Select a model from the model list
Select a year from the year list
Reload the page
Verify the selected brand, model, and year remain shown as the active vehicle selection

title: About page loads company information content
description: Verifies the About page loads and displays company information and statistics/values content.

steps.description: Navigate to /about
Verify company information content is displayed

title: About page displays mission, statistics, and values sections
description: Verifies the About page shows its main informational sections for users.

steps.description: Navigate to /about
Scroll through the about page content
Verify mission, statistics, and values content are displayed

title: About page content remains visible after page reload
description: Verifies the About page content is stable and renders after reload.

steps.description: Navigate to /about
Reload the page
Verify company information content is displayed

title: View delivery methods and payment options
description: Ensures the Delivery page loads and displays delivery methods, costs, and available payment options.

steps.description: Navigate to /delivery
Wait for the page to finish loading
Verify delivery methods with costs are displayed
Verify payment options are displayed

title: Delivery FAQ is accessible on the Delivery page
description: Ensures customers can view frequently asked questions related to delivery and payment.

steps.description: Navigate to /delivery
Scroll to the FAQ section
Expand a FAQ item
Verify the expanded FAQ item shows an answer

title: Delivery page handles delivery-method load failure with an error state
description: Validates that the UI shows an error state when delivery methods cannot be loaded.

steps.description: Navigate to /delivery
Wait for the delivery methods section to finish attempting to load
Verify an error state is displayed for delivery methods

title: Delivery page remains usable when switching between delivery methods
description: Ensures selecting different delivery methods updates the selection state in the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /delivery
Wait for delivery methods to load
Select a delivery method
Select a different delivery method
Verify the most recently selected delivery method is shown as selected

title: Delivery page remains usable when switching between payment options
description: Ensures selecting different payment options updates the selection state in the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /delivery
Wait for payment options to load
Select a payment option
Select a different payment option
Verify the most recently selected payment option is shown as selected

title: Contacts page displays contact details and map
description: Ensures the Contacts page loads and displays phone/address details and an embedded map area.

steps.description: Navigate to /contacts
Wait for the page to finish loading
Verify contact details are displayed
Verify a map is displayed

title: Submit feedback successfully from Contacts page
description: Verifies a customer can submit the feedback form and see a success confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /contacts
Fill Aida into the name field
Fill a valid phone number into the phone field
Fill Question about delivery into the message field
Submit the feedback form
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Feedback form shows validation error when message is empty
description: Ensures the feedback form prevents submission and shows a validation error when the message is missing.

steps.description: Navigate to /contacts
Fill Aida into the name field
Fill a valid phone number into the phone field
Fill an empty value into the message field
Submit the feedback form
Verify a validation error is visible for the message field

title: Feedback form shows validation error for invalid phone format
description: Ensures the feedback form validates phone input and shows an error for an invalid phone value.

steps.description: Navigate to /contacts
Fill Aida into the name field
Fill invalid-phone into the phone field
Fill Question into the message field
Submit the feedback form
Verify a phone validation error is visible

title: Contacts page feedback form remains stable after a validation error and allows resubmission
description: Verifies that after triggering a validation error, the user can correct the input and submit successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /contacts
Fill Aida into the name field
Fill a valid phone number into the phone field
Fill an empty value into the message field
Submit the feedback form
Fill Question into the message field
Submit the feedback form
Verify a success confirmation is visible
